outcomes.name: Interacting
outcomes.description: manipulates the target language in sustained interactions to exchange information, ideas and opinions

outcomes.name: Responding
outcomes.description: responds to information, ideas and perspectives in a range of texts

outcomes.name: Composing
outcomes.description: composes texts in the target language, applying a range of linguistic structures for a variety of contexts, purposes and audiences

outcomes.name: Role of language, culture and identity
outcomes.description: explains the interrelationship between language, culture and identity

outcomes.name: Language awareness and building
outcomes.description: analyses and evaluates protocols, programs and techniques to maintain and build Aboriginal Languages

outcomes.name: Interacting in Auslan
outcomes.description: exchanges information, opinions, ideas and perspectives by manipulating linguistic structures and using protocols appropriate for different audiences

outcomes.name: Understanding texts in Auslan
outcomes.description: analyses how texts represent information and/or perspectives and responds in Auslan and/or English

outcomes.name: Creating texts in Auslan
outcomes.description: creates informative and imaginative texts for different contexts and audiences using complex linguistic structures

outcomes.name: Role of language, culture and identity
outcomes.description: analyses the interrelationship between language, culture and identity

outcomes.name: Understanding texts
outcomes.description: analyses and responds to information to demonstrate understanding of a range of moderately complex texts

outcomes.name: Understanding texts
outcomes.description: translates a range of moderately complex texts into English

outcomes.name: Intercultural understanding
outcomes.description: analyses the relationship between contemporary and target languages, culture(s) and identity

outcomes.name: Reading, viewing and listening to texts
outcomes.description: uses a range of personal, creative and critical strategies to interpret complex texts

outcomes.name: Understanding and responding to texts A
outcomes.description: analyses how meaning is created through the use and interpretation of increasingly complex language forms, features and structures

outcomes.name: Understanding and responding to texts B
outcomes.description: evaluates how texts represent ideas and experiences, and how they can affirm or challenge values and attitudes

outcomes.name: Understanding and responding to texts C
outcomes.description: investigates and explains ways of valuing texts and the relationships between them

outcomes.name: Expressing ideas and composing texts A
outcomes.description: crafts personal, creative and critical texts for a range of audiences by experimenting with and controlling language forms and features to shape meaning

outcomes.name: Expressing ideas and composing texts B
outcomes.description: uses processes of planning, monitoring, revising and reflecting to purposefully develop and refine composition of texts

outcomes.name: Working mathematically
outcomes.description: develops understanding and fluency in mathematics through exploring and connecting mathematical concepts, choosing and applying mathematical techniques to solve problems, and communicating their thinking and reasoning coherently and clearly

outcomes.name: Financial mathematics
outcomes.description: solves financial problems involving simple interest, earning money and spending money

outcomes.name: Financial mathematics
outcomes.description: solves financial problems involving compound interest and depreciation

outcomes.name: Algebraic techniques
outcomes.description: simplifies algebraic fractions with numerical denominators and expands algebraic expressions

outcomes.name: Algebraic techniques (Advanced)
outcomes.description: simplifies algebraic fractions involving indices, and expands and factorises algebraic expressions

outcomes.name: Algebraic techniques (Advanced)
outcomes.description: selects and applies appropriate algebraic techniques to operate with algebraic fractions, and expands, factorises and simplifies algebraic expressions

outcomes.name: Indices
outcomes.description: simplifies algebraic expressions involving positive‑integer and zero indices, and establishes the meaning of negative indices for numerical bases

outcomes.name: Indices (Advanced)
outcomes.description: applies the index laws to operate with algebraic expressions involving negative‑integer indices

outcomes.name: Indices (Advanced)
outcomes.description: describes and performs operations with surds and fractional indices

outcomes.name: Equations
outcomes.description: solves linear equations of up to 3 steps, limited to one algebraic fraction

outcomes.name: Equations (Advanced)
outcomes.description: solves monic quadratic equations, linear inequalities and cubic equations of the form x³ = k

outcomes.name: Equations (Advanced)
outcomes.description: solves linear equations of more than 3 steps, monic and non‑monic quadratic equations, and linear simultaneous equations

outcomes.name: Linear relationships
outcomes.description: determines the midpoint, gradient and length of an interval, and graphs linear relationships, with and without digital tools

outcomes.name: Linear relationships
outcomes.description: graphs and interprets linear relationships using the gradient/slope‑intercept form

outcomes.name: Linear relationships (Advanced)
outcomes.description: describes and applies transformations, the midpoint, gradient/slope and distance formulas, and equations of lines to solve problems

outcomes.name: Non‑linear relationships
outcomes.description: identifies connections between algebraic and graphical representations of quadratic and exponential relationships in various contexts

outcomes.name: Non‑linear relationships
outcomes.description: identifies and compares features of parabolas and exponential curves in various contexts

outcomes.name: Non‑linear relationships (Advanced)
outcomes.description: interprets and compares non‑linear relationships and their transformations, both algebraically and graphically

outcomes.name: Numbers of any magnitude
outcomes.description: solves measurement problems by using scientific notation to represent numbers and rounding to a given number of significant figures

outcomes.name: Ratios and rates (Standard/Advanced)
outcomes.description: identifies and solves problems involving direct and inverse variation and their graphical representations

outcomes.name: Ratios and rates (Standard/Advanced)
outcomes.description: analyses and constructs graphs relating to rates of change

outcomes.name: Trigonometry
outcomes.description: applies trigonometric ratios to solve right‑angled triangle problems

outcomes.name: Trigonometry
outcomes.description: applies trigonometry to solve problems, including bearings and angles of elevation and depression

outcomes.name: Trigonometry (Standard/Advanced)
outcomes.description: applies Pythagoras’ theorem and trigonometry to solve 3‑dimensional problems and applies the sine, cosine and area rules to solve 2‑dimensional problems, including bearings

outcomes.name: Trigonometry (Advanced)
outcomes.description: establishes and applies the properties of trigonometric functions and finds solutions to trigonometric equations

outcomes.name: Area and surface area
outcomes.description: solves problems involving the surface area of right prisms and practical problems involving the area of composite shapes and solids

outcomes.name: Area and surface area (Standard/Advanced)
outcomes.description: applies knowledge of the surface area of right pyramids and cones, spheres and composite solids to solve problems

outcomes.name: Volume
outcomes.description: solves problems involving the volume of composite solids consisting of right prisms and cylinders

outcomes.name: Volume (Standard/Advanced)
outcomes.description: applies knowledge of the volume of right pyramids, cones and spheres to solve problems involving related composite solids

outcomes.name: Properties of geometrical figures
outcomes.description: identifies and applies the properties of similar figures and scale drawings to solve problems

outcomes.name: Properties of geometrical figures (Extension)
outcomes.description: establishes conditions for congruent triangles and similar triangles and solves problems relating to properties of similar figures and plane shapes

outcomes.name: Properties of geometrical figures (Extension)
outcomes.description: constructs proofs involving congruent triangles and similar triangles and proves properties of plane shapes

outcomes.name: Data analysis
outcomes.description: compares and analyses datasets using summary statistics and graphical representations

outcomes.name: Data analysis
outcomes.description: displays and interprets datasets involving bivariate data

outcomes.name: Data analysis (Standard/Advanced)
outcomes.description: plans, conducts and reviews a statistical inquiry into a question of interest

outcomes.name: Probability
outcomes.description: solves problems involving probabilities in multistage chance experiments and simulations

outcomes.name: Probability (Advanced)
outcomes.description: solves problems involving Venn diagrams, 2‑way tables and conditional probability

outcomes.name: Polynomials (Advanced/Extension)
outcomes.description: defines, operates with and graphs polynomials and applies the factor and remainder theorems to solve problems

outcomes.name: Logarithms (Advanced)
outcomes.description: establishes and applies the laws of logarithms to solve problems

outcomes.name: Functions and other graphs (Advanced)
outcomes.description: uses function notation to describe and graph functions of one variable and graphs inequalities in one and 2 variables

outcomes.name: Circle geometry (Extension)
outcomes.description: applies deductive reasoning to prove circle theorems and solve related problems

outcomes.name: Introduction to networks (Standard)
outcomes.description: solves problems involving the characteristics of graphs/networks, planar graphs and Eulerian trails and circuits

outcomes.name: Interacting
outcomes.description: exchanges information, ideas and perspectives in a range of contexts by manipulating culturally appropriate language

outcomes.name: Understanding texts
outcomes.description: analyses and responds to information, ideas and perspectives in a range of texts to demonstrate understanding

outcomes.name: Creating texts
outcomes.description: creates a range of texts for diverse communicative purposes by manipulating culturally appropriate language
